basics.name: Krishant Timilsina
basics.headline: Software Engineer
basics.summary: I am a software engineer who loves turning complex ideas into practical products. I work across full-stack systems, AI-driven tooling, and developer experience, with a strong bias for clarity, shipping, and long-term maintainability.

roles.title: Full Stack Developer
points: Deliver full solutions end-to-end that build on Lelapa's existing products and technical estate.
Introduce and implement unit and functional testing to uphold platform quality.
Communicate technical decisions and key implementation details with the team.
Collaborate with engineers and the product manager to deliver high-value work for the business and customers.

roles.title: Frontend Developer
points: Design and develop intuitive user interfaces for API key generation, rotation, and access control.
Implement secure authentication and authorization flows for API key management.
Co-manage platform delivery by proposing approaches and identifying key technical factors.

roles.title: Software Engineer
points: Built and maintained web and mobile experiences for himaligreen.com.

roles.title: Python Developer
points: Automated business workflows with computer vision systems.

roles.title: Design Intern
points: Contributed to multiple design projects and sharpened visual communication skills.

education.title: Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science
details: Minor project: building a serverless platform.
Ranked in the top 0.8% among 13,000 entrance applicants.

education.title: Grade 11/12, Science
education.place: SOS Herman Gmeiner Secondary School Gandaki

projects.title: Voxel Engine
projects.summary: Minecraft-inspired engine for rendering 3D worlds with efficient voxel meshing.

projects.title: Binary Plan MLM
projects.summary: Network marketing tree simulation using algorithmic structures such as AVL Trees and Kruskal's.

projects.title: Chess
projects.summary: Multiplayer chess with AI-backed logic and a custom interface built with SMFL graphics.

projects.title: Agrify
projects.summary: Flutter application built to simplify day-to-day work for farmers.

leadership: Coordinator @ PDSC (Aug 2022 - Present): Led a team of 50 and organized workshops for 300+ attendees.
Technical Lead @ IEEE Pulchowk (Apr 2024 - Dec 2024): Managed technical execution for club initiatives.
Graphics Lead @ Hult Prize IOE (Sep 2023 - Apr 2024): Designed event visuals and communication assets.
certifications: Microdegree in AI & Machine Learning - Fusemachines
awards: Best Presentation Award, Mobile Reuse Hackathon: Built a smart assistant for visually impaired users using old phones.
2nd Runner-Up, MBM Ideax Hackathon: Built a platform preserving languages through community stories.
